chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Appeal No.S-317 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For hearing of case. 12.07.2021 Mrs. Sobia Bhatti, A.P.G for the State. == None has appeared on behalf of the appellant. It is pointed out by the learned A.P.G for the State that the appellant as is reported by Superintendent Central Prison Hyderabad has already died on 29.10.2020 and with his death the instant appeal has come to an end. By stating so, it was suggested by her that the instant appeal to be ordered to abate. It is ordered accordingly. JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*
